startFreeDialog.title: Create your free account
startFreeDialog.description: Drop your business email and you're set in 2 minutes. No card, no hassle.
startFreeDialog.disclaimer: No credit card • Free forever • Cancel anytime

hero.badge: 🌱 Built in Romania, for landscaping companies
hero.titlePrefix: The management app built specifically for
hero.subtitle: No more WhatsApp chaos, weekend Excel quotes, or forgotten maintenance visits. Schedule crews, send pro quotes, and bill compliantly — all from one simple mobile app.
hero.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

problem.title: A typical day at your landscaping business?
problem.subtitle: If you recognize yourself in even 2 of these, GreenGrass was built for you.

whatsapp.title: Chaos in the WhatsApp group
whatsapp.desc: Lost messages, photos from 5 clients all mixed up, crews calling to ask «where are we going today?».

weather.title: Rain ruins the whole week
weather.desc: You reschedule 8 jobs on paper, call every client one by one, and hope you didn't forget anyone.

maintenance.title: Recurring maintenance slips
maintenance.desc: Your annual-contract client calls upset because you haven't been by in 2 months. You lose the renewal.

quotes.title: Quotes written on Sunday in Excel
quotes.desc: Instead of resting, you're calculating turf rolls, plants, labor — and still losing deals because the quote goes out too late.

social.trustedSuffix: landscaping and gardening companies in Romania 🇷🇴

features.title: Everything you need to
features.subtitle: Built around how a real landscaping business actually works — not a corporate CRM bolted on at the last minute.

scheduling.title: Scheduling & calendar
scheduling.desc: Adapt instantly to the weather. Move crews by drag & drop. Recurring visits appear automatically — no more forgotten maintenance.

estimates.title: Fast quotes & estimates
estimates.desc: Close the deal on the spot. Calculate turf rolls, plants, topsoil and labor, then send a PDF quote to the client's WhatsApp before you leave.

compliance.title: Invoicing & e-Factura
compliance.desc: Stop fighting with ANAF. Generate compliant invoices in RON and send them to e-Factura or your accountant in one click.

mobile.title: Mobile field access
mobile.desc: Your office in your pocket. See yard dimensions, history, notes and before/after photos right from your phone on site.

crews.title: Crews in the field
crews.desc: The team sees only their daily schedule — address, what to do, how long. No confusion.

dashboard.title: Big-picture overview
dashboard.desc: See all active jobs, monthly revenue, and overdue clients at a glance. Decide on numbers, not gut feel.

signup.label: 1. Create account
signup.desc: Email + password. No card, no endless forms.

addCustomer.label: 2. Add your first clients
addCustomer.desc: Type them in or import from Excel. We'll help.

grow.label: 3. Run the business stress-free
grow.desc: Schedule crews, send quotes, get paid on time.

testimonials.title: Landscaping owners
testimonials.objection: «Is it hard to use?» — If you can use WhatsApp, you can use GreenGrass. Field crews only see their daily schedule, nothing complicated.

jake.name: Andrei M.
jake.quote: I work with 2 guys. I used to forget half the maintenance visits. Now everything is on my phone, clients are happy, and I picked up 6 more annual contracts.

maria.name: Mihaela S.
maria.quote: We have 4 crews in the field. Rescheduling when it rained was a nightmare — now I do it in 2 minutes. Quotes go out same day, not on the weekend.

devon.name: Cătălin R.
devon.quote: I'm not a computer guy. But here I see in the morning where I'm going, what to do, and that's it. And I can add before/after photos straight from my phone.

pricing.title: Start free.
pricing.subtitle: Core access and features are free — no card, no trial that expires, no end-of-month surprises.

perks.core: All essential features included (clients, scheduling, quotes, mobile)
perks.optional: Pay only if you want advanced options (automatic e-Factura, multiple crews, integrations)

cta.title: Stop the chaos. Create your free account.
cta.subtitle: Save 6+ hours a week on scheduling, quotes and phone calls. Start today, see the difference by Friday.

footer.tagline: Built in Romania for landscaping companies. RON, e-Factura ready, support in Romanian. 🌿

pricing.title: Grow at your own pace.
pricing.subtitle: From a single patio to an entire territory — pick the plan that fits today, and upgrade when you're ready. All paid plans + VAT.
pricing.trialBadge: You're on the 90-day Territory trial — every feature unlocked.

trial.title: 90-day full trial
trial.desc: Every new account starts on Territory for 90 days. No credit card required.

noDataLoss.title: No data loss on downgrade
noDataLoss.desc: Your data stays. Excess teams are simply locked until you upgrade again.

vat.title: VAT-compliant invoicing
vat.desc: Add your VAT ID in Settings to receive proper EU VAT invoices.

accountLocked.title: Account locked
accountLocked.lockedSuffix: has been locked due to inactivity or by an administrator.
accountLocked.deletionInfo: remain before permanent deletion. All data is preserved until then.
accountLocked.contact: To reactivate, please contact your administrator. If you're the account owner, signing in again will automatically restore access.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.description: Enter the 6-digit code from the email we sent you, or click the link in the email.
verify.expired: Code expired. Request a new one.

resetPassword.invalidDesc: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

changePassword.title: Change Your Password
changePassword.description: You're using a temporary password. Please set a new password to continue.
changePassword.rule: Password must be at least 6 characters, with 1 uppercase letter and 1 number

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.description: Click below to stop receiving app emails from GreenGrass.
unsubscribe.successDesc: You won't receive any more app emails from us.
unsubscribe.alreadyDesc: You've already opted out of app emails.
unsubscribe.invalidDesc: This unsubscribe link is invalid or has expired.
